---
title: "04. 虚空与容纳"
subtitle: "Emptiness, Receptivity, and the Utility of the Void"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 4
categories: [tao-te-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How chapters 6, 11, 15, 16, 22, 28, 35, and 39 map emptiness, valley-logic, and receptivity onto fiber structure and Zeckendorf sparsity."
---

**Chapters:** 6, 11, 15, 16, 22, 28, 35, 39  
**Omega Directions:** `fiber structure`, `Zeckendorf representation`

{{< include articles/category_04_emptiness_receptivity.md >}}

---

[Back to Tao Te Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)


## Infographic

![category_04_emptiness_receptivity Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_04_emptiness_receptivity_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_04_emptiness_receptivity_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_04_emptiness_receptivity_infographic.png)
